channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran, US receive plan to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire; source says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran, U.S. receive plan to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire; source says
- Live updates: US, Iran weigh ceasefire proposal as countdown continues
- US and Iran reviewing ceasefire deal, reports say
- Iran, US receive draft proposal for 45-day ceasefire
- US and Iran reviewing ceasefire deal, reports say
- Proposals for immediate ceasefire to halt war circulated to US and Iran
- Iran says responses to U.S. truce plan prepared, to disclose details if necessary
- US, Iran receive framework to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire reports Reuters - ANI News
- US, Iran receive framework to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire reports Reuters - malaysiasun.com
- Iran, US receive plan to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire: Source tells Reuters - LBCI Lebanon
- Iran, US receive plan from Pakistan to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire: Source

- Iran and US receive draft proposal for 45-day ceasefire as attacks continue
- 45-day ceasefire plan offered to Iran and US, no response yet

- Iran, US receive plan to end hostilities, with immediate ceasefire, source says - Daily Maverick
- US, Iran and mediators make push for 45-day ceasefire, Axios reports

- Plan for Iran-US ceasefire could take effect Monday, officials say - Ynetnews.com
- US, Iran receive framework to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire reports Reuters - timesofoman.com
- Iran, U.S. receive plan to end hostilities, immediate ceasefire; source says
- US and Iran receive peace proposal as Trump vows 'hell' if Strait stays shut
- Immediate ceasefire: Iran, US receive plan to end hostilities, source says
- US, Iran and mediators make push for 45-day ceasefire, Axios reports
- US, Iran and mediators make push for 45-day ceasefire: Axios
- U.S., Iran and mediators make push for 45-day ceasefire, Axios reports

- US, Iran discuss potential two phase deal including 45-day ceasefire - Axios

item.title: Iran rejects ceasefire in response to proposals and emphasises need for permanent end to war, IRNA says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran rejects ceasefire amid escalating strikes
- Iran 'objecting to any kind of ceasefire', diplomat says
- Iran rejects ceasefire as Trump says entire country can be ‘taken out’
- Iran conveys to Pakistan its rejection of US ceasefire proposal: report
- Iran sends proposal on ending war, rejects temporary ceasefire: IRNA
- Iran rejects latest ceasefire proposal as Trump deadline looms
- Iran rejects latest ceasefire proposal, calling instead for permanent end to the war
- Iran Rejects Ceasefire as Trump Deadline Looms and Strikes Escalate
- Iran rejects latest ceasefire proposal as Trump deadline approaches
- Iran says no to ceasefire, seeks permanent end to war
- Iran Rejects Latest Cease-Fire Proposal, Wants Permanent End to War
- Iran's state-run IRNA news agency says Tehran rejects latest ceasefire proposal and wants permanent end to the war
- Iran issues ceasefire demands, including protocol for Hormuz and lifting of sanctions
- Iran war: Tehran reportedly rejects ceasefire proposal
- Iran rejects ceasefire proposal with US as war of words deepens
- Iran rejects ceasefire, demands 'permanent end to war' in counter-proposal to US, says IRNA
- 'Will continue war ...': Iran rejects temporary truce; sets condition for talks
- Iran rejects ceasefire proposal, wants permanent end to war as deadline nears on Trump ultimatum
- Iran demands ‘end to imposed war,’ rejects idea of ceasefire
- ‘DON’T dare us!’: Iran rejects temporary ceasefire proposal as Trump’s ‘hell’ threat nears deadline
- Iran rejects temporary truce, to pursue war until permanent end to hostilities
- Iran rejects temporary ceasefire proposal: What we know about the war, now in its 6th week]]>

- Artemis II breaks record for farthest human spaceflight

- Historic leap: Artemis 2 targets Apollo 13 record in high-stakes Moon flyby
- Artemis II breaks record for farthest human travel from Earth

- It’s time for Artemis II to break Apollo 13’s distance record. What to know about the moon flyby
- Artemis II astronauts on course to set new distance record during moon flyby
- Artemis II astronauts race to set a new distance record from Earth and behold the moon’s far side
